meta.title: ATHAR — Every WhatsApp message answered in under 30 seconds
meta.description: Egyptian clinics: from unread WhatsApp messages to every patient replied in under 30 seconds, within 7 days. EGP 2,000/month vs EGP 10,000 for a receptionist. 14-day money-back guarantee.

hero.headline_1: Every WhatsApp message your clinic gets — answered in under 30 seconds.
hero.headline_2: Live in 7 days. Even at 2 AM.
hero.subline: A receptionist costs EGP 8,000–12,000/month and still misses messages after 6 PM. ATHAR starts at EGP 2,000/month and replies 24/7 — about one-fifth the cost, four times the coverage.
hero.cta_secondary: Send a WhatsApp now — watch it reply in 15 sec ←
hero.badge: 14-day guarantee: if your average WhatsApp response time isn't under 30 seconds within two weeks of launch, you pay nothing that month. No exceptions.

problem.headline: Patients message after 6 PM. Nobody is on the other side.
problem.subline: Every clinic without 24/7 WhatsApp coverage loses the same patients in the same three ways.

pains.title: "Good evening, I'd like to book" — at 10:47 PM
pains.body: The message arrives after the receptionist has gone home. By morning the patient has booked with whoever answered first. 35% of new-patient WhatsApp leads go to a competitor when the first reply takes longer than two hours.

pains.title: "We'll remind you the day before" — but nobody does
pains.body: Two hours of your staff's day go to manual reminders, and 20% of patients still cancel last minute. Each empty slot is EGP 500–2,000 in revenue you can never bill back.

pains.title: "Have you been here before?" — and there's no way to know
pains.body: History lives in WhatsApp threads, appointments in your head, notes on paper. 60% of returning patients get asked the same intake questions twice because no single record exists.

problem.transition: These three leaks have one shared cause: nobody is on WhatsApp when the patient is. That's what ATHAR fixes — and you can test the fix in the next 15 seconds.

solution.headline: Every conversation becomes a patient record. The longer you run it, the more it knows.
solution.subline: Not a generic bot. A system trained on your clinic's flow — message it on WhatsApp now and watch the reply land in under 15 seconds.

pillars.title: A searchable patient file — built from your WhatsApp, with zero data entry
pillars.body: Every message is logged with name, inquiry, appointment, and status. After 90 days you have a 300+ patient database you didn't type a word of — and it keeps growing every time someone messages you.

pillars.title: A 15-second reply — test it right now
pillars.body: Open WhatsApp, send any patient question to our number, and the system replies, qualifies, and offers a booking slot inside the same chat. What you experience is exactly what every patient of yours would experience tonight at 11 PM.

pillars.title: A full schedule — without a single reminder call
pillars.body: Automatic confirmation, 24-hour reminder, in-chat rescheduling. Clinics on FLOW cut last-minute cancellations by 60% inside the first 30 days.

tiers.headline: Three plans. One guarantee.
tiers.subline: Every plan: WhatsApp response time under 30 seconds within 14 days, or you pay nothing that month.

process.headline: Three deliverables. Not three meetings.
process.subline: Each step ends with something concrete you keep — not "let's regroup next week."

steps.title: Your Patient Drop-Off Map (delivered in 45 min)
steps.body: We trace your current WhatsApp and appointment flow message by message and mark exactly where patients are leaking — late reply, no reminder, no record. You walk away with the map whether or not you sign.

steps.title: Your Live Auto-Reply, Connected to Your Tools (5–14 days)
steps.body: We build the automation, wire it to your WhatsApp Business, calendar, and CRM, and run it against real scenarios from your clinic — every flow tested before any patient sees it.

steps.title: Your 30-Day Performance Dashboard
steps.body: From day one live, you see response time, bookings, and cancellation rate updated daily. If any number misses the target, we tune the system on our time — not yours.

founder.headline: We noticed Egyptian clinics losing patients between 10 PM and 8 AM.
founder.body: Not because the care was poor — but because no clinic software speaks Egyptian Arabic on WhatsApp the way patients actually write. So we built a system that reads the message in real dialect, replies in under 15 seconds, qualifies the patient, and books inside the same chat. It now handles after-hours WhatsApp for clinics in Cairo and Alexandria: zero unanswered messages overnight, and a 60% drop in cancellations within the first 30 days.

proof.headline: Numbers from Egyptian clinics. Not estimates.
proof.subline: Measured in the first 30 days after launch.

testimonials.quote: Before ATHAR, 40% of our nighttime WhatsApp messages went unanswered. After 7 days every message was getting a reply in under 20 seconds — and we booked 15 new appointments that first week.
testimonials.name: Dr. Mariam Salem

testimonials.quote: I used to spend 11 hours a week on reminder messages. ATHAR took all of it. Cancellations dropped 60% in the first 30 days and I haven't sent a manual reminder since.
testimonials.name: Dr. Ahmed El-Sharif

faq.headline: Straight answers.
faq.subline: If something isn't here, ask it on the free 45-min audit.

items.a: 14-day guarantee: if your average WhatsApp response time isn't under 30 seconds within two weeks of launch, you pay nothing that month. No exceptions, no fine print.

items.q: Is this right for my small clinic?
items.a: Yes — if patients message your clinic on WhatsApp and you can't always reply within two hours. CORE at EGP 2,000/month is built for solo and 2–3 chair clinics. No — if you don't use WhatsApp at all, or if you already have a 24/7 receptionist on payroll.
CORE: 5–7 days to your first live auto-reply. FLOW: 10–14 days to full schedule + reminders. ELITE: 2–3 weeks depending on specialty. The 14-day guarantee clock starts the day you go live.

items.q: Do I need to change how I work?
items.a: No. You keep the same WhatsApp number your patients already use. The automation runs behind it. No new app to install, no staff training beyond a 20-min handover.

items.q: Will it work with my existing tools?
items.a: WhatsApp Business, Google Calendar, and most clinic CRMs out of the box. Anything custom we confirm in writing inside your Drop-Off Map (step one) — before you commit.
Yes. Every plan includes ongoing support. ELITE includes a dedicated account manager who reviews your numbers every Sunday and adjusts flows that week.
